allow:
Bash(git add .gitignore infra/ docker-compose.yml && git rm db/init.sql && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
refactor: move db scripts under infra/ for cleaner root structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
refactor: move design docs into docs/ folder

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add README.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
docs: update README links and project tree to reflect new layout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add OmniSift.sln && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
chore: normalize sln project paths to forward slashes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)
